{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230544555C850F1806E59F7AA3AF"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617158824576058136","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺不错，作者加油保持更新！目前奶爸日常文中个人觉得少有能和火车供水员那本差不多感觉的了（个人最爱的奶爸系列，老书虫十来年起点或别平台看过几十百本不止，强推），很温馨，非常适合睡觉前带着放松的心情阅读，真的能让你微微一笑，代入感很强。当然。只是对真正喜欢这个日常文风的书友哈。","text_exts":[{"e":109,"s":105,"text":"微微一笑","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BE%AE%E5%BE%AE%E4%B8%80%E7%AC%91&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742158959F7AA3AF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617158824576058136%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227534985833825176600%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BE%AE%E5%BE%AE%E4%B8%80%E7%AC%91%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773511533,"group_id":"7534985833825176600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N12ResL9FPehpF4tXvX/UbzOEs9nXOuS42D0MYkxmAOt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cf47ed9c796547b68476fb7a6ab39f20~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787929&x-signature=f9JI3lowRKYkgGDX8bCPanCW1YE%3D","user_id":"2725066222877274","user_name":"安安静静过自己"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2725066222877274","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7534985833825176600","book_info":{"abstract":"风格：重生+奶爸+暴富+治愈日常+田园生活+国民萌娃+大佬+家庭互动
 
孟绍文重生了。
囤币、写文、追回前世错过的同学，再把家里小馆做成金字招牌——顺手的事。
 
他本以为自己能顺风顺水躺平，可他家“小悍匪”却不依了。
孟绍文怎么办？双手一摊，宠着呗！

三月春耕，她在田埂滚成小泥猴；
四月清明，她跟老祖开起茶话会；
五月樱桃，她骑爸爸脖子上狂炫；
……
腊月杀猪，她从龇牙咧嘴吃到喜笑颜开。
孟绍文心满意足。

直到他把女儿“勇闯孟家小馆”的视频传上网——
沅沅年开端！
比特币暴涨！
编辑催更催到咆哮！
饭馆电话被打爆，小镇挤得水泄不通！
……
孟绍文低头看着怀里吧唧嘴的小肉团子，陷入沉默：
“你看，你叫爸爸给你拍视频发网上，现在好了，网上都在问爸爸你喜欢什么颜色的麻袋。
你喜欢什么颜色的麻袋？”

“咦～？”
沅沅仰起小脸一脸疑惑，随后咧嘴一笑，递过半根啃过的黄瓜：
“爸爸，呲。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d0e4e107c09c2a3d809c013fe2e5d937~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"想摆烂的咸鱼有梦想","author_id":"","book_id":"7534985833825176600","book_name":"重生奶爸：这个萌娃太全面了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7534986160880239128","read_count":"12519","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"352480"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"150","tags":"都市日常,都市,奶爸,重生,乡村,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/37c24001b9745daec756fc69fe5ba091~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779399895&x-signature=fhfzque6TSnP9WIidBT%2BZTVNtaw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"773673641060816","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"136"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230544555C850F1806E59F7AA3AF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"li 春耕秋收陪娃闹，一不小心把娃养成全网最火村娃，奶爸的佛系人生，彻底热闹了～
无狗血无糟心，全是泥土炊烟的暖，搞钱带娃的爽，还有小悍匪的萌！
希望大家喜欢和支持～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769496323,"group_id":"7534985833825176600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"请各位多多支持啊，谢谢大家😁😁😁","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxQXPYHVetNT4MITv0nGTyQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5dcf486a442143b28b4ec26bb7f380e5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796737&x-signature=a8DOX39uCwRR1WTUca8wxo9XKtM%3D","user_id":"773673641060816","user_name":"想摆烂的咸鱼有梦想"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"773673641060816","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_4","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.4","title_id":"author_level_4"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.4","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.4"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7534985833825176600","book_info":{"abstract":"风格：重生+奶爸+暴富+治愈日常+田园生活+国民萌娃+大佬+家庭互动
